Dear Sirs,  
 
Sub: Transcript of the Earnings Call  
 
Further to our letter dated 03rd November, 2022 and pursuant to Regulation 30(6) read with 
Part A of Schedule III of SEBI (LODR), Regulations 2015, the transcript of the Earnings call 
held on Monday, November 14, 2022 for the quarter and half year ended September 30, 
2022 
has 
been 
uploaded 
on 
the 
Company’s 
website 
at 
https://glenmark.b-
cdn.net/gpl_pdfs/investors/reports_presentations/earning_concall/Transcript_GlenmarkPha
rma-Earnings%20call-14Nov-2022.pdf 
 
Request you to kindly take the same on record.  
 
Thanking you. 
  
Yours faithfully, 
For Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Limited 
 
 
 
Harish Kuber  
Company Secretary & Compliance Officer
